title: DE module (DESeq2 + edgeR/limma)
context: Differential-expression with ≥2 independent engines lets us report agreement and avoid single-method artefacts (PLAN §8 M1). Results are research-only with no clinical/biomarker framing. Binding guardrails: open-access / aggregate / de-identified data only; controlled-access (dbGaP/EGA/biobanks) and identifiable patient data are out of scope; COSMIC/OncoKB/MSigDB-restricted are recipe-reference only; no clinical/diagnostic/prognostic/treatment language; research-only, not medical advice; provenance on every assertion.
objective: Implement a differential-expression module running ≥2 engines (DESeq2 + edgeR/limma) on the same contrast, reporting cross-engine agreement.
acceptanceCriteria: At least 2 DE engines produce results for the same contrast; agreement between engines is reported.
Contrasts use only published/open sample metadata; the inclusion list is recorded.
No clinical/biomarker language; results are labelled research-only.
output: A pull request adding the differential-expression module (DESeq2 + edgeR/limma) with cross-engine agreement reporting.
